item.title: Version 1.5
item.description:
What's New in 1.5

  • Harmonized usage display — both Codex and Claude Code now lead with the 5-hour rate-limit window as the primary gauge, with the 7-day window always shown as a secondary row; no more guessing which limit you're close to
  • Smarter reset notifications — rolling window drift no longer triggers spurious "quota reset" alerts on every refresh; notifications only fire when the window has genuinely elapsed
  • Gentle update reminders — Sparkle update alerts no longer steal focus from your active app (required behavior for menu bar apps)
  • Auto-update check frequency — app now checks for updates twice daily in addition to on every launch
